of these functions should be callable by nofeeswap only.Each pre hook is invoked while the corresponding pool is unlocked. A snapshot of all the input data is provided. Other parameters can be read externally.Each mid hook is invoked while the corresponding pool is locked. A snapshot of memory containing all of the pool parameters prior to the action is provided to the hook contract.Each post hook is invoked while the corresponding pool is unlocked.
